product_overview: Real-time crisis simulation backend providing session lifecycle, agent orchestration, voice streaming and a single event-driven WebSocket channel for all frontend panels.
core_goals: Provide a single source of truth for a crisis session via a shared crisis_sessions document and an append-only session event stream.
Orchestrate isolated AI agents (per-agent Firestore collections and Gemini Live sessions) that interact only through controlled tools and shared events.
Deliver low-latency, event-driven updates to the frontend via WS /ws/{session_id} and provide REST endpoints for panel-level reads and chairman actions.
Preserve strict memory isolation: never expose agent private memory via any endpoint.

features.name: Session Lifecycle
features.description: Create, inspect, update, and end crisis sessions. Session creation bootstraps the scenario, agents and voice sessions; full merged session state is available via GET.
user_flows: POST /api/sessions with valid body {crisis_input, chairman_name?, session_duration_minutes?} -> Receive 201 with session_id, chairman_token and ws_url -> GET /api/sessions/{session_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with full session state including status, timer and agent_count
POST /api/sessions with crisis_input shorter than required -> Receive 422 with {"error": "crisis_input_too_short"}

PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"paused": true} -> Receive 200 with updated_fields and current_state -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives session_paused event

DELETE /api/sessions/{session_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with closed_at and agents_released -> Subsequent GET /api/sessions/{session_id} with same token -> Receive 403 or 404 (session closed/invalid token depending on implementation)

features.name: Scenario (Briefing Room)
features.description: Poll the generated scenario spec during assembling and fetch generated SKILL.md per agent for debugging and transparency.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/scenario with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} when scenario_ready=true -> Receive 200 with full scenario and agents list
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/scenario with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} while Scenario Analyst still running -> Receive 202 with scenario_ready=false and assembly_log
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/scenario/skill/{agent_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with skill_md and generated_at
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/scenario/skill/{agent_id} with invalid chairman_token -> Receive 403 {"error":"invalid_chairman_token"}

features.name: Agent Roster & Management
features.description: List agents, view individual public state, apply chairman actions (dismiss/silence/address), summon new agents and fetch agent transcripts.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with agent_roster, active_count and trust scores
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents/{agent_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with full public agent state including public_positions and statement_count

PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents/{agent_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"action":"dismiss"} -> Receive 200 with action_applied and effect -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives agent_dismissed event

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents/summon with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"role_description": "..."} -> Receive 202 with request_id and status=generating -> Poll GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents/{new_agent_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} once ready -> Receive 200 with new agent public state
PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id}/agents/{agent_id} without Authorization or with invalid token -> Receive 403 {"error":"invalid_chairman_token"}

features.name: Crisis Board (decisions, conflicts, intel, timeline)
features.description: Read full board state, pin or create decisions, resolve conflicts, inject intel and query historical board snapshots.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/board with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with agreed_decisions, open_conflicts and critical_intel

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/board/decisions with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"text": "...", "source":"chairman","lock": true} -> Receive 201 with decision_id and locked=true -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives decision_agreed event

PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id}/board/conflicts/{conflict_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"resolution": "...", "decision_text": "..."} -> Receive 200 with resolved_at and auto_created_decision_id -> WebSocket receives conflict_resolved and decision_agreed events
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/board/timeline?at={ISO} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with board state at that timestamp
POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/board/decisions with Authorization missing or invalid -> Receive 403 {"error":"invalid_chairman_token"}

features.name: Crisis Feed
features.description: Load feed items (by source or 'hot' filter), view world events and mark items read for unread badge tracking.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/feed?limit=30 with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with items, tab_counts and next_cursor
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/feed/world with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with world_events and next_escalation timer

PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id}/feed/{feed_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"read": true} -> Receive 200 confirming feed_id read -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives feed_unread_count update
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/feed with invalid chairman_token -> Receive 403

features.name: Agent Voice Pods (pods state & pod detail)
features.description: Get the real-time status of all agent pods and fetch detailed pod view including recent transcript snippets.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/pods with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with list of pods and status counts
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/pods/{agent_id} with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with recent_transcript, waveform_active and trust_score
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/pods when chairman_token expired -> Receive 403 invalid_chairman_token

features.name: Room Intelligence (Observer insights & trust)
features.description: Fetch Observer Agent insights, current trust scores for all agents and per-agent trust history for sparklines.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/intel with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with insights array and insight_counts
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/intel/trust with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with trust_scores per agent
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/intel/trust/{agent_id}/history with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with history array and current_score
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/intel without Authorization -> Receive 403

features.name: Crisis Posture
features.description: Read the three posture axes (public_exposure, legal_exposure, internal_stability) and their trend histories for UI sparklines.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/posture with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with axes values, trends and last_updated
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/posture/history?axis=public_exposure with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with history array
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/posture with invalid token -> Receive 403

features.name: Resolution Score
features.description: Retrieve current resolution score, trend, driver and next escalation timer as well as full score history.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/score with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with score, label, trend and next_escalation info
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/score/history?limit=30 with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with timestamped history and net_change
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/score without Authorization -> Receive 403

features.name: World Agent (Escalation Engine)
features.description: Read World Agent status and scheduled escalation events, and optionally trigger a manual escalation from the Chairman.
user_flows: GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/world with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with world_agent_active, next_escalation and fired_events

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/world/escalate with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"event_text":"...","event_type":"INTERNAL","score_impact":-5} -> Receive 201 with event_id and broadcast_to_agents -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives crisis_escalation and feed_item events
POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/world/escalate with invalid or missing token -> Receive 403

features.name: Chairman Actions (commands, vote, command history)
features.description: Chairman can send targeted text commands, call votes and fetch command history. Votes produce results via WebSocket events.
user_flows: POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/chairman/command with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"text":"NOVA, what is the legal minimum disclosure window?","target_agent_id":"nova_{session}","command_type":"question"} -> Receive 200 with command_id and routed_to list -> Target agent receives system turn via Gemini Live and frontend sees chairman_spoke event via WS

POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/chairman/vote with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"question":"Do we issue a public statement?","time_limit_seconds":120} -> Receive 202 with vote_id and agents_voting -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives vote_result event when completed
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/chairman/commands with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with commands array
POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/chairman/command without Authorization -> Receive 403

features.name: Voice (chairman token, voice status, mic control, audio stream)
features.description: Acquire ephemeral audio token for chairman mic, check voice session health and mute/unmute chairman mic. A separate WS audio stream carries raw PCM audio.
user_flows: POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/voice/token with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with ephemeral token, expires_at and ws_audio_url -> Open WS /ws/{session_id}/audio?token={ephemeral_audio_token} -> Send PCM audio frames and receive vad/transcript/routed_to events
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/voice/status with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} -> Receive 200 with chairman_mic and agent_sessions health summary

PATCH /api/sessions/{session_id}/voice/chairman with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"muted": true} -> Receive 200 with updated chairman_mic and applied_at -> WebSocket receives chairman_mic_status event
POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/voice/token with expired or invalid chairman_token -> Receive 403

features.name: Resolution & After-Action Report
features.description: Trigger resolution mode to generate final agent positions and fetch the after-action report containing decisions, agent verdicts and replay links.
user_flows: POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/resolution with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} and body {"final_decision":"..."} -> Receive 200 with resolution_id and processing=true -> WebSocket WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} receives agent_final_position events followed by session_resolved event
GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/report with Authorization: Bearer {chairman_token} after resolution -> Receive 200 with final_decision, final_score, agent_positions, key_moments and replay_start_url
POST /api/sessions/{session_id}/resolution without Authorization -> Receive 403

features.name: Real-time Event Stream (WebSocket)
features.description: Single primary WebSocket channel /ws/{session_id} streams all live events (agent speaking chunks, board changes, posture/score updates) and receives chairman messages/commands.
user_flows: WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} open -> Receive session_status and agent_assembling events as they are pushed -> Receive session_ready event when bootstrapping completes

WS /ws/{session_id}?token={chairman_token} open -> Send chairman_command message {"type":"chairman_command","command":"inject_intel","params":{...}} -> Receive chairman_spoke and feed_item events reflecting the injected intel
WS /ws/{session_id}?token=invalid open -> Connection rejected or no events (client should fall back to error handling and re-authenticate)
